title: A2A Job Orb Metadata Schema
description: The standardized payload and metadata contract that Ironborn Archer (scrapers) must tag raw jobs with when writing to the public database, which Astra (evaluators) utilizes for hybrid querying.

title.description: Normalized job title, e.g., 'Senior React Developer'.

remote_policy.description: The strict remote working policy. CRITICAL: Scrapers must deduce this from the job description if not explicitly declared.

clearance_required.description: True if the job requires an active US security clearance (Secret, TS/SCI, Polygraph). Scrapers must scan description for clearance keywords.

clearance_level.description: The specific level of clearance required.

posted_date.description: ISO-8601 date string when the job was posted, e.g., '2026-05-26'.

source_url.description: Direct application url to the employer's portal (Lever, Greenhouse, Workday).
